scheme_name: Stipend Scheme For Poultry Farming Training For Divyang People
page_title: Stipend Scheme For Poultry Farming Training For Divyang People

details: The scheme “Stipend Scheme for Poultry Farming Training for Divyang People” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to raise the income of Divyang poultry farmers through scientific poultry farming training. Under this scheme, the beneficiary will be given a maximum ₹2000 (direct in bank account) stipend for six days of training and a poultry training certificate after completion of training.
benefits: The beneficiary will be given maximum ₹2000 (direct in bank account) stipend for six days training. (Considering ₹300/- per day, ₹1800/- for 6 days as daily allowance and ₹200/- as to & fro transport fare with the maximum total stipend ₹2000/-)
Beneficiary will be given poultry training certificate after completion of training.
eligibility: The benefits of this scheme will only be given to the adult of Divyang people of the society of Gujarat State.
The beneficiary will have to provide an income proof certificate.
Females and beneficiaries Below Poverty Line will be given priority.

offline: The beneficiary has to apply online at I-Khedut Portal.
Click on the "Apply New" button and submit a new application.
Click on the "Update Application" button to add corrections to the application.
Once the application is done, confirm it. The application must be confirmed within seven days from the date of saving the online application.

The application must be signed and submitted along with the supporting documents to the office address mentioned on the application” or “Application confirmed within seven days from the date of saving the online application Scanned copy of the application and other documents can be uploaded after confirming the application
Take a printout of the confirmed application.
It is mandatory to take a printout of the application (only applying online will not count as an application).

Take a printout of the online application and submit it along with necessary documents to the office/office address mentioned on the application or after applying online on the I-Khedut Portal, take a printout of the application and scan it with signature/thumbprint and "Signed Application Print" on the portal. A copy can be uploaded by clicking on Upload" menu. "Other Document Upload" wherever applicable.

The application will be inwardly taken online by the concerned officer/office only if the correct and sufficient documents are uploaded along with the application signed/fingerprinted by the beneficiary.

If wrong/incomplete documents are uploaded online by the beneficiary, such application will not be inwarded online. In such circumstances, the beneficiary has to submit the remaining/correct documents to the concerned office within seven days of application.
Scanned copy uploaded in PDF format should not exceed 200 KB in size.

documents_required: Identity proof i.e. Aadhaar Card, Voter ID Card
Savings Account Bank Passbook or Cancelled Check (if applicable)

faqs.question: What is the objective of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The objective of the scheme is to raise the income of Divyang poultry farmers through scientific poultry farming training.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to get the benefits of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The benefits of this scheme will only be given to the adult of Divyang people of the society of Gujarat state.

faqs.question: What is the benefit of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The beneficiary will be given a maximum ₹2000 (direct in bank account) stipend for six days of training.

faqs.question: How much will daily allowance be given under this scheme?
faqs.answer: ₹300/- per day will be given as a daily allowance to the beneficiary.

faqs.question: For how many days will daily allowance be given to the trainees?
faqs.answer: Daily allowance will be given for 6 days of the training.

faqs.question: How much will transport fare be given to the trainees?
faqs.answer: ₹200/- will be given as transport fare to the beneficiary during training.

faqs.question: Who will get priority under the scheme?
faqs.answer: Females and beneficiaries below poverty line will be given priority.

faqs.question: Is an income certificate mandatory for a beneficiary?
faqs.answer: Yes, the beneficiary should have an income proof certificate.

faqs.question: How will the beneficiary receive the stipend amount?
faqs.answer: The beneficiary will receive the stipend amount directly in the bank account.

faqs.question: How can a beneficiary apply under the scheme?
faqs.answer: The applicant needs to visit the nearest Intensive Poultry Development Project Office or District Poultry Extension Centre and collect the application form.

faqs.question: Can a beneficiary also apply online mode?
faqs.answer: Yes, an online application is to be made on I-Khedut Portal. https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/iKhedutPublicScheme/Public/frm_Public_ANH2_SchemeApplicaiton.aspx
